features: STAINLESS STEEL: Being made with Food Grade Stainless Steel these Whisks are made to last and are highly durable and will withstand heavy use

MULTI-USE SET: With this set including 8 Inch, 9 inch and 10 Inch whisks this set will ensure you can covers all your Kitchen food prep tasks wit it being Whisking, Stirring, Blending or airrating
DISHWASHER SAFE: This Chef Aid Balloon Whisk is Dishwasher safe and will not rust of degard with high pressure cleaning
